text: Some will don't touch your skin, they will hurt people.
No marks outside, but chaos within.
Not every silence is calm, not every smile is sad.
Our movement passes in the brain, but it still stays by over you.
That show, my enforces work, they shape the decisions, they chase the directions,
they rear at the face of you.
Now less tuning point in your life, you will be less sound.
And that's when you realize, you don't start in silence before you.
